mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.building_id, b.name AS building_name, r.room_no, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM dorm_rooms r JOIN dorm_buildings b ON r.building_id = b.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.building_id, b.name AS building_name, r.room_no, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM dorm_rooms r JOIN dorm_buildings b ON r.building_id = b.id WHERE b.name = #{buildingName} AND b.status = 1 AND r.status = 1 ORDER BY r.id ASC

SELECT r.id, r.building_id, b.name AS building_name, r.room_no, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM dorm_rooms r JOIN dorm_buildings b ON r.building_id = b.id ORDER BY b.id ASC, r.status DESC, r.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dorm_rooms (building_id, room_no, status) VALUES (#{buildingId}, #{roomNo}, #{status})
